title: 宝塚記念の後に・わらう？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Telling Tosen Jordan that there's nothing cooler
than being the greatest dummy seems to help her
run with all her might.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm spreads to Nakayama Festa, who
declares she's aiming to take on the world, and
encourages Jordan to attempt a feat only she can
pull off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking on what kind of feat would qualify,
Jordan realizes that to be the greatest means to
run faster than any legend in the history books.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing her new goal, I suggest the autumn
Tenno Sho as the place to make it a reality. Fired
up already, she challenges Gold Ship to join too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Gold Ship refuses, claiming it's not her
race to run. The fall Tenno belongs to Jordan.
